senses.definition: a sauce made with tomatoes, garlic, onion, vinegar, etc. that is usually served with barbecued food

examples.x: The food truck offered a unique twist on classic barbecue, featuring a spicy and tangy barbecue sauce with a hint of citrus.
They gathered around the picnic table, passing around a bottle of barbecue sauce to enhance the flavor of their hamburgers.
He slathered the ribs with a generous amount of barbecue sauce before placing them on the grill to caramelize.
The homemade barbecue sauce had a perfect balance of sweetness and tanginess, making it an instant hit at the cookout.
She marinated the chicken wings in spicy barbecue sauce overnight for maximum flavor.
The pulled pork sandwich was topped with coleslaw and a drizzle of smoky barbecue sauce.

senses.definition: a rich sauce made with milk, flour, and butter

examples.x: She used white sauce to make a classic lasagna with layers of pasta and cheese.
The recipe called for adding white sauce to the chicken and broccoli mixture for a comforting casserole.
He prepared a homemade white sauce to drizzle over the roasted vegetables.
The chef demonstrated how to make a velvety white sauce as a base for a pasta dish.
The white sauce was enhanced with garlic and herbs to complement the fish.

senses.definition: a spicy condiment typically made from chili peppers and other ingredients

examples.x: As soon as the hot sauce touched his lips, he felt a rush of heat spreading throughout his mouth.
When I tasted the hot sauce, my taste buds were instantly awakened by its intense heat and bold flavor.

senses.definition: a type of sauce made from tomatoes, often used as a flavoring for food

examples.x: She poured tomato sauce over the pasta.
The pizza was covered with homemade tomato sauce.
He added spices to the tomato sauce for extra flavor.
The recipe calls for fresh tomato sauce.
She bought a jar of tomato sauce from the store.

senses.definition: a thin dark brown sauce, made from soybeans, used in Asian cuisines

examples.x: She served a dipping sauce made from soy sauce, honey, and chili for the crispy spring rolls.
They brought a bottle of soy sauce to the picnic, adding a savory twist to their outdoor meal.
She drizzled soy sauce over her stir-fried noodles for added flavor.
Soy sauce is a key ingredient in traditional Japanese dishes like sushi and teriyaki.

senses.definition: a condiment typically used to enhance the flavor of steak, often made with a combination of savory and tangy ingredients

examples.x: As soon as the steak sauce touched his lips, he knew he had discovered the secret ingredient.
They attended a cooking class where they learned to make their own homemade steak sauce.

senses.definition: a cold sauce made from tomatoes, which has a thick texture and is served with some food

examples.x: He squirted ketchup on his hot dog to add a bit of sweetness and tang.
The restaurant served a small bowl of ketchup alongside the basket of crispy fries.
She prefers to mix ketchup with mayonnaise for a creamy dipping sauce.
They ran out of ketchup, so he had to use mustard on his sandwich instead.
The kids enjoyed dipping their chicken nuggets into ketchup during lunch.

senses.definition: a spicy sauce made with chilis and tomatoes, widely used in Mexican cuisine

examples.x: She dipped her chips into fresh salsa.
The tacos were served with homemade salsa.
He made a spicy salsa with extra chili peppers.
The restaurant offers mild and hot salsa.

senses.definition: a creamy condiment typically made with mayonnaise, pickles, and various seasonings, often served with seafood

examples.x: He spread a generous amount of tartar sauce on his fish sandwich.
You can elevate your fish tacos by adding a dollop of tartar sauce.

senses.definition: a mixture of oil, vinegar, and seasonings, commonly used as a salad dressing

examples.x: When I tasted the vinaigrette, I was instantly transported to a sunny Mediterranean coastline.
You can marinate your grilled chicken in a citrus vinaigrette before cooking.

senses.definition: a sour liquid that is commonly used in cooking, cleaning, or to preserve food

examples.x: As soon as the vinegar touched her lips, she could feel the mouth-puckering sensation.
She mixed vinegar with oil and herbs to create a homemade salad dressing.
They used vinegar to pickle cucumbers, transforming them into crunchy and tangy homemade pickles.

senses.definition: a vegetable, usually a small cucumber, that is preserved in salt water or vinegar

examples.x: She packed a lunchbox with a turkey sandwich layered with pickles.
When I tasted the pickles, I was pleasantly surprised by the perfect balance of sourness and spices.

senses.definition: a condiment made from finely chopped pickles

examples.x: I heard their specialty burger is served with homemade pickle relish.
I never thought of adding pickle relish to tartar sauce, that sounds amazing!

senses.definition: a type of flavorful liquid or reduction made with wine as a primary ingredient

examples.x: He created a delicious mushroom and wine sauce to accompany his vegetarian lasagna.

senses.definition: a mayonnaise that is seasoned with garlic and occasionally with red pepper

examples.x: When I tasted the aioli, I was pleasantly surprised by the balance of rich garlic and zesty lemon.
You can use aioli as a versatile condiment for burgers, tacos, and even as a dip for vegetables.

senses.definition: a creamy and savory sauce made from bread crumbs, milk, and spices

examples.x: Guests were impressed by the roasted duck with bread sauce.
He made a luxurious bread sauce with warm milk and spices.

senses.definition: a creamy and savory sauce made with melted cheese

examples.x: He made a creamy and flavorful cheese sauce by combining different varieties of cheese.
His homemade lasagna was enhanced with a rich cheese sauce.

senses.definition: a spicy and flavorful condiment made from chili peppers, vinegar, and various seasonings

examples.x: He prepared a homemade chili sauce by blending fresh chili peppers, garlic, and vinegar.
You can elevate your tacos by spooning some chili sauce onto the fillings.

senses.definition: a brown sauce made from cooked meat juice and stock that is thickened with flour

examples.x: I would like some extra gravy on my roast beef sandwich.
They couldn't get enough of the savory gravy that accompanied their Sunday roast

senses.definition: a type of sauce made with garlic, oil, lemon juice, and salt, used to add flavor to meat, fish, or vegetables

examples.x: She dipped her fries in garlic sauce.
The grilled chicken was covered in creamy garlic sauce.
He made homemade garlic sauce with olive oil and lemon.
Garlic sauce adds a rich flavor to kebabs.
The restaurant’s garlic sauce is famous for its strong taste.

senses.definition: a thick white dressing made with egg yolks, vegetable oil, and vinegar, served cold

examples.x: She spread mayonnaise on the sandwich to add a rich, creamy texture.
The recipe for coleslaw called for mixing mayonnaise with shredded cabbage and carrots.
He made a homemade mayonnaise using a blender to achieve a smooth consistency.
The chef recommended adding a touch of mayonnaise to the deviled eggs for extra creaminess.
He prefers to mix mayonnaise with mustard for a tangy spread on his burgers.

senses.definition: a savory and flavorful condiment made with mushrooms and other ingredients

examples.x: He poured the rich mushroom sauce over his grilled steak.
She stirred the creamy mushroom sauce into her pasta.

senses.definition: a condiment of hot or savory taste that is served with meat, cheese, etc.

examples.x: You can elevate your tuna salad by mixing it with a spoonful of relish.

senses.definition: a pale yellow dressing similar to mayonnaise that is served with sandwiches, salads, etc.

examples.x: He whipped up a homemade salad cream with mayonnaise and herbs.
They served fresh vegetables with a side of tangy salad cream.

senses.definition: a savory jelly made from meat or fish stock used to set ingredients in a solidified form

examples.x: Last night we served individual portions of chicken and mushroom aspic.
They celebrated the special occasion with a beautifully molded aspic.

senses.definition: a sweet vinegar with dark color that is aged in barrels, originally from Italy

examples.x: They dipped their bread into a small bowl of balsamic vinegar and olive oil.
They used balsamic vinegar to marinate the grilled chicken.

senses.definition: a flavorful liquid made by simmering meat, fish, or vegetables in water
a combination of either pickles, vegetables, spices, and herbs, that is used as condiment

examples.x: I created a unique avocado chutney, blending the creamy fruit with lime juice, cilantro, and jalapenos.
When I tasted the tomato chutney, I was pleasantly surprised by the robust flavors.
The mango chutney served with the curry added a tangy sweetness to the dish.
The mint chutney provided a refreshing contrast to the spicy samosas.
The tamarind chutney had a perfect balance of sweet and sour flavors, complementing the savory pakoras.

senses.definition: a thick cold sauce in which pieces of food are dunked before being eaten

examples.x: He prepared a delicious spinach and artichoke dip for the party.
When I tasted the caramel dip, I couldn't resist dipping my apple slices into the sweet and sticky sauce.

senses.definition: a flavorful mixture used to enhance the taste of salads and other dishesavor
a tangy and slightly sweet salad dressing made with a combination of vinegar, oil, ketchup, and various seasonings
a dish consisting of a mixture of mashed avocado, onions, chilies, tomatoes, etc., originated in Mexico

examples.x: He decided to make his own guacamole using ripe avocados, lime juice, and a sprinkle of salt.
You can customize your sandwich with a dollop of guacamole.

senses.definition: a sauce made with egg yolks, butter, and lemon juice or vinegar, often served with vegetables

examples.x: She spooned a velvety hollandaise sauce over her grilled asparagus
The chef prepared a delicious hollandaise sauce for the restaurant's signature dish.

senses.definition: a cold sauce made with mayonnaise, minced onions, vinegar, chili sauce, etc., usually served with seafood or salads
a popular dressing or dip made with buttermilk, garlic, herbs, and other flavors, used for salads, vegetables, and snacks

examples.x: As the chef, I created a special pizza with ranch sauce instead of traditional tomato sauce.
He dipped his crispy chicken nuggets into the creamy ranch.

senses.definition: a pasta sauce that is made with basil, olive oil, garlic and pine nuts to which grated parmesan is also added

examples.x: She packed a lunchbox with a delicious pesto pasta salad.
She tossed her steaming pasta with a dollop of pesto, creating a vibrant and flavorful meal.

senses.definition: a tangy and spicy British relish made with pickled vegetables

examples.x: She served a side dish of piccalilli with her homemade burgers.
You can't go wrong with a dollop of piccalilli on a juicy burger or hot dog.

senses.definition: a mixtures of oil, spices, vinegar or wine in which food, especially meat or fish, is left to become softer or be flavored before cooking

examples.x: They let the steak sit in the marinade overnight to enhance its tenderness and flavor.
They mixed together yogurt, turmeric, and ginger to create a flavorful Indian marinade for the chicken tikka.

senses.definition: a very hot and spicy sauce made with red chili peppers, originally made in Portugal

examples.x: I prepared a piri-piri marinade by blending together chili peppers, garlic, and lemon juice for the grilled vegetables.
She coated the pork ribs with a generous amount of piri-piri marinade.

senses.definition: a very hot sauce that is made with fully ripe red peppers
a spicy sauce made with peanuts served with an Indonesian or Malaysian food of the same name

examples.x: He drizzled satay sauce over the grilled vegetables for a nutty taste.
She loves dipping her spring rolls in satay sauce for extra flavor.
They served satay sauce as a condiment alongside the main dish.
The satay sauce was so delicious that she asked for the recipe.
The chicken skewers were served with a generous portion of satay sauce.

senses.definition: a thick sauce made with butter and egg yolks, seasoned with shallots, tarragon and vinegar

examples.x: As a chef, I take pride in creating a homemade Bearnaise sauce that elevates any dish.
We enjoyed lobster tails with creamy Bearnaise sauce.

senses.definition: a creamy white sauce made from cooked butter and flour mixed with milk

examples.x: I couldn't resist licking my spoon clean after tasting the bechamel sauce.
She prepared a lasagna with layers of noodles, meat, and bechamel sauce.
We topped our baked potatoes with a generous drizzle of bechamel sauce.

senses.definition: an Italian sauce that is made with chopped bacon, grated parmesan cheese and eggs, served with pasta

examples.x: He grew up in an Italian household and learned how to make carbonara from his nonna.
I attended a cooking class where we learned the secrets to making a perfect carbonara sauce.

senses.definition: a thick cream that is made by gradually heating whole milk until lumps of cream rise to the top, originally made in the UK

examples.x: The clotted cream added a creamy element to the homemade trifle.
The strawberries and clotted cream combined to create a heavenly dessert parfait.

senses.definition: an Italian sauce consisting of tomatoes, onions, garlics, herbs and seasonings, served with pasta

examples.x: He uses marinara sauce as a dip for his garlic bread and a base for his lasagna.
They traveled to Italy and enjoyed the authentic marinara sauce at a charming seaside restaurant.

senses.definition: a velvety sauce that is based on béchamel with grated gruyere or parmesan cheese

examples.x: My parents hosted a brunch and served Eggs Benedict with a luscious mornay sauce, impressing their guests.

senses.definition: a cold yellow or brown condiment with a hot taste taken from the seeds of a small plant with yellow flowers

examples.x: She spread a dollop of mustard on her sandwich for an extra kick.
You can't have a classic hot dog without a generous squeeze of mustard on top.
The chef prepared a honey mustard glaze to baste the grilled chicken thighs.

senses.definition: a mixture of ingredients that is typically added to salads or other dishes to enhance their flavor and texture

examples.x: The restaurant offers a variety of salad dressings, allowing you to customize your salad to your liking.
We discovered a new salad dressing recipe that combines honey and mustard for a perfect balance of sweet and tangy flavors.

senses.definition: a tangy and savory condiment made from anchovies, vinegar, and various spices, originally made in Worcester, England

examples.x: I love to sprinkle Worcestershire sauce on my scrambled eggs.
The secret behind Worcestershire sauce lies in its unique combination of ingredients, such as anchovies, tamarind, and spices.
They say that Worcestershire sauce gets its name from the city of Worcester in England.

senses.definition: a type of rich and hearty Italian sauce made with ground meat, tomatoes, and aromatic herbs

examples.x: I always make a large batch of bolognese pasta sauce and freeze it in portions, so I can enjoy it anytime I want.
The restaurant served a mouthwatering plate of spaghetti with bolognese pasta sauce.

senses.definition: a tomato-based sauce commonly used as a topping for spaghetti and other pasta dishes

examples.x: I like to add extra herbs and spices to my homemade spaghetti sauce for a personalized touch.
The restaurant served a variety of pasta dishes, each featuring their signature spaghetti sauce.

senses.definition: a flavorful condiment typically used to enhance the taste of tacos and other Mexican dishes

examples.x: As a taco enthusiast, I always make sure to have a bottle of taco sauce in my pantry.
He generously poured taco sauce over his loaded nachos.

senses.definition: a tangy and creamy condiment typically made with mayonnaise, mustard, pickles, and herbs

examples.x: He mixed the remoulade sauce with a hint of lemon juice, giving it a refreshing twist.
She used to dip her fried shrimp into the tangy remoulade sauce when she was younger.

senses.definition: a tangy and spicy condiment typically served with seafood

examples.x: As a dipping sauce connoisseur, I declared the cocktail sauce as the ideal accompaniment to my fried fish fillets.
She spread a dollop of cocktail sauce on her oysters.

senses.definition: a pureed mixture of cooked apples, often sweetened and flavored with spices

examples.x: In my favorite restauran, warm applesauce is served as a side dish with the roasted chicken.
We brought a jar of homemade applesauce to share at the picnic.

senses.definition: a rich and complex Mexican sauce made with chili peppers, chocolate, nuts, and various spices

examples.x: Even the pickiest eaters were won over by the creamy and mildly spicy mole.
I enjoyed the vegetarian black bean and vegetable mole as a delicious meat-free option.

senses.definition: a concentrated stock made from fish bones, shells, or seafood trimmings with vegetables and herbs used for flavoring sauces, soups, and stews

examples.x: I asked my sister to add a touch of fumet to her creamy mushroom sauce.
They simmered the chicken fumet for hours, creating a flavorful base for their homemade soup.

senses.definition: a small, tangy, and pickled flower bud commonly used as a condiment or ingredient in various dishes

examples.x: He garnished the grilled fish with a few capers, enhancing its savory taste.
It's always a good idea to keep a jar of capers in the pantry for those moments when you want to elevate your recipes.
